canonicalReview.notes: Existing canonical articles cover charging failure, pairing, iPhone battery drain, and notification routing. None covers Apple Watch daily battery drain, post-watchOS drain, low power mode tradeoffs, cellular/workout drain, and battery health service triage as the primary intent.
